description.value:
Requirements You're in a zero-gravity environment

Effect You expand your body and use a specialty organ of compressed oxygen to fill it with breathable air. When you do this, your body increases its size to Huge and your Speed becomes 0. In this form, you can carry up to six Medium or smaller willing creatures and fully protect them from the vacuum of space.

You remain in this form as long as you're in a vacuum, or until you choose to revert to your normal form as a single action; otherwise, this ability lasts one hour per level.
